name: io.github.ArnasDon/wacrm-mcp
description: Drive a self-hosted wacrm WhatsApp CRM from Claude, Cursor and other MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: WACRM_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your wacrm instance, e.g. https://crm.example.com

environmentVariables.name: WACRM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: wacrm API key (Settings → API keys). Its scopes decide what is allowed.

environmentVariables.name: WACRM_ENABLE_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose contact create/update and message sending. Read-only when unset.

environmentVariables.name: WACRM_ENABLE_BROADCASTS
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose the mass-broadcast tool. Requires WACRM_ENABLE_WRITES.
